bug_report.summary: Address bar (awesomebar) dropdown shows large empty whitespace below the "This time, search with:" footer after change
steps_to_reproduce: Click/focus the address bar to open the autocomplete dropdown (do not type anything, or type enough to show results).
expected_behaviors: The autocomplete dropdown height should closely fit the displayed results and footer, without a large unused blank area at the bottom.
actual_behaviors: The autocomplete dropdown renders with a substantial empty/blank area below the "This time, search with:" footer row (visible as a large white region), wasting space and making the panel look incorrectly sized.

false_positive_reasons: LLM hallucination — misinterpreted or imagined GUI rendering

bug_report.summary: about:logins: Action controls (Edit/Remove/Copy) styling/layout differs after refactor to self-contained command buttons
steps_to_reproduce: Create and save a new login (e.g., https://login.live.com / delete.me@example.com)
View the saved login’s details page and compare the action controls (Edit, Remove, Copy buttons and eye icon) to the pre-change build
expected_behaviors: Edit, Remove, and Copy command buttons retain identical styling and layout (padding, alignment, icon/text positioning) compared to before the change, per the intent to preserve styling/behavior
actual_behaviors: Multiple visible diffs are detected on the command-button UI regions (Edit/Remove buttons and the per-field Copy buttons/eye icon), indicating a change in rendering/styling/layout after the refactor (see diff regions around the Edit button, Remove button, and Copy buttons).
